description_long: This object is a vintage computer monitor with a boxy, angular design and a predominantly red exterior casing. The front features a convex glass screen surrounded by a black bezel, with a vertical control panel on the right side that includes several buttons and sliders. The top of the monitor has a set of ventilation grilles and what appears to be a compartment or additional controls. The rear side is equipped with more ventilation slots, a power cord, and a plug, as well as a small access panel. The sides are plain, with the red casing extending smoothly from front to back, and the monitor sits directly on its base without a separate stand. The overall appearance suggests a robust, utilitarian build typical of late 20th-century electronics.
description: A vintage red computer monitor with a convex glass screen, black bezel, and side control panel, featuring a built-in power cord and rear ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex glass screen, black bezel, vertical control panel with buttons and sliders, and the power cord emerging from the side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain red casing and the monitor's angular, boxy profile.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the ventilation slots, power cord and plug, a small access panel, and the overall red casing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the smooth red casing and the power cord extending outward.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is black, moderately thick, with a matte finish and straight edges, providing a strong visual contrast to the red casing. It frames the convex glass screen and features a vertical control panel on the right.
attribute_stand_type: No separate stand; the monitor sits directly on its flat base, which is integrated into the main casing and made of the same red plastic material.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons and sliders are vertically arranged on the right side of the front bezel, adjacent to the screen, forming a grouped control panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is present on the lower front bezel, centered below the screen, with white text in a stylized font.
